onboarding.keep_updated: Keep your location updated to receive accurate tips.
onboarding.location_info_desc: Enter your location to receive smart trade tips based on stickers in your region.

dashboard.hero_subtitle: Your official (unofficial) companion for completing the FIFA 2026 World Cup collection.
dashboard.mission_desc: We created this app to transform the experience of collecting stickers. Our mission is to help you organize your inventory, visualize your progress in real-time and, most importantly, connect you with other collectors to facilitate trades in your region.
dashboard.feature_manage_desc: Mark your pasted stickers and manage your duplicates intuitively and quickly.
dashboard.feature_track_desc: See detailed statistics and daily progress charts in the dedicated analysis tab.
dashboard.feature_connect_desc: Find smart tips on where to trade your stickers based on users in your city.
dashboard.status_connected: You are connected as a collector in {{city}}.

album.empty_state: No stickers found with these filters.
album.view_all_alpha: Displaying all stickers in alphabetical order
album.no_missing_stickers: Congratulations! Looks like you completed this part of the album!

progress.title: Collection Progress
progress.subtitle: Track your journey to the complete album
progress.no_data_desc: Stick some stickers to see your collection grow!
progress.tip_success: Good news! There are collectors in {{city}} with duplicate stickers from {{team}} that you don't have yet!
progress.tip_none: We haven't found compatible swaps for you in {{city}} yet. How about inviting more friends?
progress.congrats: Congratulations! You have completed your album! 🎉

auth.alert_register: Registration complete! Check your email if confirmation is active.
auth.save_merge_info: When saving, your local collection is ready to migrate to your account. You keep your progress and get cloud backup.
auth.link_merge_info: When linking, your current collection is merged with your account. You lose nothing — and get cloud backup and access on other devices.
auth.local_not_migrated: Warning: local progress will not be migrated
auth.existing_account_warning: When logging into an existing account, progress made as a guest will stay on this device and won't be joined to your account. To preserve your data, use Link Account in the next tab.
auth.email_already_exists_error: This email already has an account. Use 'Login to existing account' if you want to access it — but warning: your current progress will stay only on this device.
auth.guest_migration_success: Your guest progress has been migrated successfully!

about.cloud_desc: Your collection is safe in the cloud. Access from any device and never lose your progress again.
about.privacy_desc: You control what data to share. Your personal information stays with you.
about.simplicity_desc: Intuitive interface so you can focus on what matters: completing your album.
about.feature_stickers_desc: One tap marks that you have the sticker. Extra taps add duplicate stickers for trading.
about.feature_nav_desc: Use the sidebar (or bottom menu on mobile) to quickly jump between team groups.
about.feature_album_desc: In the Progress tab, you see detailed charts and know exactly how many stickers are missing.
about.feature_filters_desc: You can filter to see only missing or only your duplicates to make trading easier.
about.collection_desc: Your World Cup sticker collection, organized and protected in the cloud.
